responses: Hey there! 🎸 Welcome to GuitarHub! How can I help you today?
Hello! Looking for your perfect guitar? I'm here to help!
Hi! Welcome to GuitarHub. Ask me anything about our guitars!
Goodbye! Rock on! 🎸
See you later! Come back anytime!
Take care! Happy playing! 🎵
You're welcome! 😊 Anything else I can help with?
Happy to help! Let me know if you need anything else.
Anytime! Feel free to ask more questions!
We have a wide collection of Electric and Acoustic guitars! 🎸 Click 'Start Shopping' to browse all guitars.
Our collection includes guitars from Fender, Gibson, Taylor, Martin, Ibanez, PRS and more! Visit our shop to see all products.
We carry both Electric and Acoustic guitars from top brands. Check out our shop section for the full collection!
Our electric guitars include: Fender Stratocaster, Gibson Les Paul, Ibanez JEM77P, PRS Custom 24, Epiphone SG and Fender Jazzmaster! 🎸
We have amazing electric guitars starting from Rs. 58,499! Popular choices are Fender Stratocaster and Gibson Les Paul.
Top electric guitar picks: Fender Stratocaster (Rs. 1,68,999), Gibson Les Paul (Rs. 2,59,999), PRS Custom 24 (Rs. 5,84,999)!
Our acoustic guitars include: Taylor 814ce, Martin D-45, Yamaha LL16 and Guild D-40! 🎵
We have premium acoustic guitars starting from Rs. 2,59,999! Taylor and Martin are our most popular acoustic brands.
Top acoustic picks: Taylor 814ce (Rs. 4,15,999), Martin D-45 (Rs. 3,89,999), Guild D-40 (Rs. 3,76,999)!
We carry top guitar brands: Fender, Gibson, Taylor, Martin, Ibanez, PRS, Epiphone, Yamaha and Guild! 🎸
Our brand lineup includes Fender, Gibson, Taylor, Martin, Ibanez, PRS, Epiphone, Yamaha, and Guild — all authentic!
We stock guitars from 9 world-class brands: Fender, Gibson, Taylor, Martin, Ibanez, PRS, Epiphone, Yamaha and Guild!
We have 2 Fender guitars: Fender Stratocaster Classic (Rs. 1,68,999) and Fender Jazzmaster Vintage (Rs. 2,33,999)! 🎸
Fender Stratocaster Classic — an iconic electric guitar from 1965 at Rs. 1,68,999. Also check out the Fender Jazzmaster Vintage at Rs. 2,33,999!
We carry the Gibson Les Paul Standard — a premium electric guitar with warm tone, priced at Rs. 2,59,999! 🎸
Gibson Les Paul Standard (1959) is available at Rs. 2,59,999. Only 3 in stock — grab it fast!
Our guitars range from Rs. 58,499 (Epiphone SG) to Rs. 5,84,999 (PRS Custom 24). There's something for every budget! 💰
Budget option: Epiphone SG at Rs. 58,499. Mid-range: Fender Stratocaster at Rs. 1,68,999. Premium: PRS Custom 24 at Rs. 5,84,999!
We have guitars for all budgets! Entry level from Rs. 58,499, mid-range from Rs. 1,68,999, and premium up to Rs. 5,84,999.
To check your order status, please log in to your account and go to Order History! 📦
You can track your orders by logging in and visiting the Orders section in your profile.
Login to your account and check the Order History section to see all your orders and their status!
Ordering is easy! 🛒 Browse guitars → Add to Cart → Checkout → Done! You need to be logged in to place an order.
To buy: 1) Browse our collection 2) Click on a guitar 3) Add to Cart 4) Go to Checkout 5) Confirm your order!
Simply browse, add your favorite guitar to the cart, and proceed to checkout. Make sure you're logged in first!
Click the 'Login' button at the top to sign in, or 'Sign Up' to create a new account — it's free and quick! 😊
Creating an account is easy! Click Sign Up, enter your name, email and password and you're good to go!
You can sign up with just your email and password. Click the Login/Signup button to get started!
We offer fast shipping! 🚚 Delivery usually takes 3-7 business days depending on your location.
All orders are shipped quickly and securely. Expect delivery within 3-7 business days!
We deliver across the country! Standard delivery takes 3-7 business days. All guitars are carefully packaged.
All our guitars are 100% authentic and come with manufacturer warranty! ✅
We guarantee all instruments are genuine with full warranty. Not satisfied? Contact our support team!
Every guitar we sell is authentic with warranty included. We stand behind the quality of every instrument!
You can reach our support team at support@guitarhub.com 📧 We respond within 24 hours!
Need help? Email us at support@guitarhub.com or use the contact form. We're here to help!
Our support team is available Mon-Sat 9AM-6PM. Email: support@guitarhub.com 😊
For beginners, I recommend the Epiphone SG at Rs. 58,499 — great quality at an affordable price! 🎸
Best for beginners: Epiphone SG (Rs. 58,499). Best mid-range: Fender Stratocaster (Rs. 1,68,999). Best premium: PRS Custom 24 (Rs. 5,84,999)!
It depends on your budget and style! Beginners: Epiphone SG. Intermediate: Fender or Ibanez. Pro: Gibson Les Paul or PRS Custom 24!
Stock levels vary by product. Visit the shop page to see real-time availability for each guitar! 📦
You can check current stock on each product page. Some guitars are limited — grab yours before they're gone!
We update stock in real time. Check the product page for current availability. Limited stock on premium models!
